title: TerraCraft
description: TerraCraft changes Minecraft's terrain drastically! It adds new bosses, new food, new items, and even more wildlife!
body:
![TerraCraft Logo Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f18e238d90c5d11950d526785bf4d1ab566d3d2.png)
## 📖 Info:
TerraCraft changes Minecraft's terrain drastically! It adds new bosses, new food, new items, and even more wildlife!


## ⬆️ Updates:

This modpack is updated monthly so make sure to download the latest version. Each update brings new mods and updates existing ones!

## 🖥️ FPS Example:

AMD Ryzen 7 5800H

AMD Radeon RX 6500M

16 GB allocated RAM

**Average FPS: 290**


## 📈 Requirments:

6 GB+ RAM for smooth gameplay.

Mid range CPU.

Mid range graphics card.
